title: Contributing to tezr
text: Thank considering contributing package!

title: Contributing to tezr
text: Fork repository Clone fork: git clone https://github.com/-username/tezr.git Create branch: git checkout -b feature/-feature-name

title: Contributing to tezr
code: # Install development dependencies install.packages("devtools") devtools::install_dev_deps()

title: Contributing to tezr
text: Write code following existing style Document functions roxygen2 comments Add tests new functionality Run checks locally:
code: devtools::document()  # Update documentation devtools::test()      # Run tests devtools::check()     # Run R CMD check

title: Contributing to tezr
text: Use 2 spaces indentation Follow tidyverse style guide Keep lines 80 characters possible

title: Contributing to tezr
text: Add tests tests/testthat/ Use testthat edition 3 syntax Ensure tests pass submitting

title: Contributing to tezr
text: Document exported functions Include examples run without errors Update NEWS.md user-facing changes

title: Contributing to tezr
text: Ensure devtools::check() passes errors, warnings, notes Commit changes clear messages Push fork Open pull request

title: Contributing to tezr
text: Open issue questions discussions.

title: Analysis Examples
text: Suppose want track interest topic changed across decades. standard starting point bibliometric analysis. can replace search term topic interest.

title: Analysis Examples
text: Let’s use search_advanced() search_field parameter set . result tibble matching records year, author, university, metadata.
code: # Search for "iklim değişikliği" (climate change) in thesis titles climate <- search_advanced(keyword = "iklim değişikliği",                            search_field = "all",                            max_search_results = Inf) glimpse(climate)

title: Analysis Examples
text: Let’s count theses per year smooth 10-year rolling average. rolling average reveals sustained growth versus one-spikes. can adjust k wider narrower window.
code: # Count theses per year yearly_counts <- climate |>   count(year) |>   arrange(year) |>   mutate(     year_numeric = as.numeric(year),     # 10-year rolling average to smooth yearly variation     rolling_avg = rolling_mean_right(n, k = 10)   )  # Bar chart with rolling average overlay yearly_counts |>    na.omit() |>    ggplot(aes(x = year_numeric)) +   geom_col(aes(y = n), fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.6) +   geom_line(aes(y = rolling_avg), color = "red", linewidth = 1) +   labs(     title = "Climate Change Research in Turkish Universities",     subtitle = "Annual thesis count with 10-year rolling average",     x = "Year",     y = "Number of Theses",     caption = "Red line: 10-year moving average"   ) +   theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

title: Analysis Examples
text: can split degree type see drives growth. Filter two main types readable plot.
code: # Compare master's and PhD thesis counts over time type_trends <- climate |>   filter(thesis_type_en %in% c("Master", "Doctorate")) |>   count(year, thesis_type_en) |>   mutate(year = as.numeric(year))  type_trends |>    ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n, color = thesis_type_en)) +   geom_line(linewidth = 1) +   labs(     title = "Climate Research by Degree Type",     x = "Year",     y = "Number of Theses",     color = "Degree"   ) +   theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

title: Analysis Examples
text: Suppose want identify universities produce research given field. can replace "Ekonometri" subject list_subjects().

title: Analysis Examples
code: # All econometrics theses, counted by university econ_theses <- search_detailed(subject = "Ekonometri",                                max_search_results = Inf)  uni_counts <- econ_theses |>   count(university, sort = TRUE)  uni_counts |>    head(10)

title: Analysis Examples
text: Let’s create simple bar chart. Horizontal bars make long Turkish university names easy read.
code: uni_counts |>    head(10) |>    ggplot(aes(x = n, y = reorder(university, n))) +   geom_col() +   labs(     title = "Top 10 Universities for Econometrics Research",     subtitle = "Total thesis count (all years)",     x = "Number of Theses",     y = NULL   ) +   theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

title: Analysis Examples
text: Let’s compare top four universities 2000 onward.
code: top4_unis <- uni_counts$university[1:4]  # Filter to top 4 universities, 2000 onward uni_trends <- econ_theses |>   filter(university %in% top4_unis) |>   mutate(year = as.numeric(year)) |>   filter(year >= 2000) |>   count(year, university)  uni_trends |>    ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n, color = university)) +   geom_line() +   labs(     title = "Econometrics Research Trends at Top Universities",     subtitle = "2000-present",     x = "Year",     y = "Number of Theses",     color = "University"   ) +   facet_wrap(~university, scales = "free_y") +   theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +   theme(legend.position = "none")

title: Analysis Examples
text: Let’s assume higher PhD ratio suggests research-intensive program.
code: # Compute PhD share at each top university top_unis <- uni_counts$university[1:10]  degree_comparison <- econ_theses |>   filter(university %in% top_unis) |>   filter(thesis_type_en %in% c("Master", "Doctorate")) |>   count(university, thesis_type_en) |>   pivot_wider(names_from = thesis_type_en, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) |>   mutate(phd_ratio = Doctorate / (Doctorate + Master)) |>    arrange(desc(phd_ratio))  degree_comparison

title: Analysis Examples
text: can extract research themes thesis abstracts keywords. Detail records include keywords_tr, keywords_en, abstract_original, abstract_translation. example fetches details small sample article builds quickly.

title: Analysis Examples
code: # Search for machine learning theses ml_search <- search_basic("makine öğrenmesi",                           max_search_results = Inf)  # Fetch full details (abstracts, keywords, advisor, PDF URLs) ml_search_sample <- ml_search |>    slice_head(n = 5)  ml_details <- ml_search_sample$detail_id |>   lapply(detail) |>   bind_rows()

title: Analysis Examples
text: keywords_tr field contains semicolon separated terms. Let’s split , trim whitespace, count.
code: # Parse comma-separated keywords into individual rows keywords <- ml_details |>   filter(!is.na(keywords_tr)) |>   select(thesis_no, keywords_tr) |>   mutate(keywords_tr = str_split(keywords_tr, ";")) |>   unnest(keywords_tr) |>   mutate(keyword = str_trim(keywords_tr)) |>   filter(keyword != "")  # Top 5 keywords keyword_freq <- keywords |>   count(keyword, sort = TRUE) |>   head(5)  keyword_freq |>    ggplot(aes(x = n, y = reorder(keyword, n))) +   geom_col() +   labs(     title = "Most Common Keywords in Machine Learning Theses",     x = "Frequency",     y = NULL   ) +   theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

title: Analysis Examples
text: Save search results disk first fetch. Load later sessions skip network calls. RDS preserves column types CSV useful sharing.
code: # Save after first fetch saveRDS(econ_theses, "econ_theses.rds") readr::write_csv(econ_theses, "econ_theses.csv")  # Load in a later session econ_theses <- readRDS("econ_theses.rds")

title: Analysis Examples
text: large result sets, fetch details batches save batch. protects interruptions — process stops, lose current batch.
code: batch_size <- 50 all_results <- search_basic("panel data")  for (i in seq(1, nrow(all_results), by = batch_size)) {   batch_end <- min(i + batch_size - 1, nrow(all_results))   batch <- all_results[i:batch_end, ]    # detail() uses built-in rate limiting   details <- detail(batch$detail_id)    # Save each batch to disk   saveRDS(details, paste0("details_batch_", i, ".rds"))    # Optional short pause between batches   Sys.sleep(2) }

title: Analysis Examples
text: tezr uses built-2-second rate limit request setup. detail() fetches uncached records parallel (5 active requests), large jobs can still take time. Process batches cache results possible.

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: search_basic() searches National Thesis Center (NTC) database keyword. checks fields default, works well know term appears. output tibble one row per thesis.
code: # Search all fields for "tarımsal sulama" ag_irrigation <- search_basic("tarımsal sulama") # Column names and types dplyr::glimpse(ag_irrigation)

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: can use search_field argument restrict matching single field. Available search field values "" (default), "title", "author", "supervisor", "subject", "index", "abstract". Use search_detailed(thesis_no = ...) thesis-number lookup.
code: # Search only in thesis titles ag_irrigation_title <- search_basic(   "tarımsal sulama",    search_field = "title") dplyr::glimpse(ag_irrigation_title) # Search abstracts abstract_search <- search_basic(   "production function",    search_field = "abstract")  # Search by author name author_search <- search_basic(   "Işıl Şirin Selçuk",    search_field = "author")

what: Filtering by Thesis Type and Access Status
title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: search_basic() also accepts thesis_type access_type filters. filters applied server-side, download fewer records. Available thesis_type values : "" (default), "masters", "phd", "medical_specialty", "arts", "dentistry", "medical_sub", "pharmacy". Available access type values : "" (default), "open", "restricted".
code: # PhD dissertations only phd_results <- search_basic(   "ekonometri",    thesis_type = "phd") dplyr::glimpse(phd_results) # Open access theses only open_results <- search_basic(   "hanehalkı",    access_type = "open")

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: Basic search exceed 2000 results. server-side limit. query returns 2000 records, function warns . cases, can set max_search_results = Inf paginate past limit. search_basic() automatically delegates advanced search pagination set max_search_results = Inf. information pagination .
code: # This stops at 2000 climate_change <- search_basic("climate change")  # Delegate to advanced search with auto-pagination climate_change_all <- search_basic(   keyword = "climate change",   max_search_results = Inf )

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: search_advanced() adds year range, language, thesis type, access type, thesis status filters keyword search. NTC advanced search form supports three keyword rows combined Boolean operators (, , ), targeting different field. search_advanced() exposes first keyword row. R packages interface academic databases, rentrez (PubMed) europepmc (Europe PMC), often pass Boolean logic single query string (example, "term1 term2"). NTC accept free-form Boolean strings. uses structured form fields keyword row, pattern applicable . keep interface simple, search_advanced() expose Boolean row combinations. equivalent results, can use following approaches. : Use search_detailed() field-specific parameters (title, author, supervisor, etc.). : Run separate searches combine dplyr::bind_rows() |> dplyr::distinct(). : Run searches exclude dplyr::anti_join().

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
code: # Keyword search with year range recent_climate <- search_advanced(   keyword = "iklim değişikliği",   year_start = 2015,   year_end = 2024 )  # English-language theses only # language accepts ISO 639 codes ("tr", "en", "fr", "de", ...), or # full names ("Turkish", "French") english_growth <- search_advanced(   keyword = "economic growth",   language = "en" )  # French-language theses french_theses <- search_advanced(   keyword = "migration",   language = "fr" )

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: status controls whether results include approved theses also -preparation ones: "approved" (default), "", "in_preparation".
code: # In-preparation theses (not yet defended) ongoing_ml <- search_advanced(   keyword = "makine öğrenmesi",   status = "in_preparation" )

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: can combine filters build precise keyword queries. Start minimal query, add constraints.
code: # PhD theses in social sciences, open access, 2000-2024 complex_query <- search_advanced(   keyword = "ekonometri",   search_field = "title",   thesis_type = "phd",   year_start = 2000,   year_end = 2024,   access_type = "open" )

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: max_search_results greater 2000 (including Inf) server reports 2000 matches, tezr switches iterative year-range pagination. supply year_start year_end, package uses 1959:current_year search window. creates year chunks weighted split points (pre-2000, 2000-2010, post-2010) safety target hard 2000-row cap. chunk requested filters original query. chunk still capped server limit, chunk split retried range small enough (single year remains). process, tezr updates split weights observed uncapped chunk densities bias later splits toward denser periods. Finally, chunk results merged, deduplicated thesis_no, returned. single year still exceeds 2000 results, package paginate year warns narrow query additional filters.
code: # Retrieve all title matches (auto-paginate by year) all_eu <- search_advanced(   keyword = "avrupa",   search_field = "title",   year_start = 2010,   year_end = 2020,   max_search_results = Inf ) dplyr::glimpse(all_eu)

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: search_detailed() provides field-specific keyword search. Use need target thesis titles, authors, supervisors, subjects, index terms, abstracts. supports auto-pagination flow search_advanced(). Supported keyword parameters search_detailed() title, author, supervisor, abstract, keyword, subject. can combine university, university_id, group, thesis_type, year_start, year_end, language, access_type, status, max_search_results, ignore_cache. YÖK’s redesigned detailed form supports field-specific institutional filters. tezr sends university, institute, division, subject, discipline, group, thesis-number filters form use search_detailed().

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: can still use list_*() functions inspect YÖK’s metadata tables interpret result fields.
code: # All universities unis <- list_universities() head(unis) # Subjects have Turkish and English names subjects <- list_subjects() subjects |>   filter(stringr::str_detect(name_tr, "Ekonomi")) # Other list functions (each returns 'name' and 'id' columns) institutes <- list_institutes() divisions <- list_divisions() disciplines <- list_disciplines()

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
code: # All econometrics theses econ_all <- search_detailed(subject = "Ekonometri")

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: can also filter results supervisor names.
code: # Find theses supervised by a specific supervisor supervisor_theses <- search_detailed(supervisor = "Mustafa Kadir Doğan") head(supervisor_theses)

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: YÖK web portal accepts one value per keyword field. tezr removes restriction supported keyword fields selected filters. pass multiple values, package expands separate API calls, combines results, deduplicates thesis_no.
code: # Search multiple subjects multi_subject <- search_detailed(   subject = c("Ekonomi", "Ekonometri") )  # Multiple thesis types multi_type <- search_detailed(   subject = "Ekonomi",   thesis_type = c("phd", "masters") )  # Multiple languages (ISO 639 codes) multi_lang <- search_detailed(   subject = "Ekonomi",   language = c("tr", "en", "fr") )  # Search multiple subjects with pagination multi_subject_all <- search_detailed(   subject = c("Ekonomi", "Ekonometri"),   max_search_results = Inf,   ignore_cache = TRUE )

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: Search results contain core metadata (title, author, university, year, type, subject). need full details, abstracts, keywords, supervisor names, page counts, PDF links, can use detail() function.

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: Pass search-result row detail() fetch full record. row includes encrypted_no, detail() uses automatically request citation metadata.
code: # Search and get details for the first match econ_phd <- search_detailed(   subject = "Ekonometri",   thesis_type = "phd",   year_start = 2024,   year_end = 2025 )  econ_phd_details <- detail(econ_phd[2, ])  dplyr::glimpse(econ_phd_details)  # English abstract econ_phd_details$abstract_translation

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: can also pass search-result rows fetch details multiple theses. function shows text progress updates default fetches uncached records parallel (5 active requests).
code: # Fetch details for all results econ_phd <- search_detailed(   subject = "Ekonometri",   thesis_type = "phd",   year_start = 2025,   year_end = 2026 )  # Batch retrieval econ_phd_all_details <- detail(econ_phd)

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: functions return summary statistics tables NTC.
code: # Thesis counts by year year_stats <- stats_years() tail(year_stats) # Thesis counts by university uni_stats <- stats_universities() head(uni_stats)  # Thesis counts by subject subject_stats <- stats_subjects() head(subject_stats)  # Total counts by thesis type type_stats <- stats_types() type_stats

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: tezr caches search results, detail records, year-range queries, lookup lists memory. Caching speeds repeated queries reduces server load.

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: output includes search_count, range_count, detail_count, search_ttl, detail_ttl. Search cache defaults 3600 seconds (1 hour). Detail cache defaults NULL (session lifetime; entries stay clear restart R).
code: # Shows: enabled status, item counts, and TTL settings cache_info()

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: can clear specific cache types everything . "lookups" option clears cached university/subject/division lists.
code: # Clear search results only cache_clear("searches")  # Clear detail records only cache_clear("details")  # Clear lookup lists (universities, subjects, etc.) cache_clear("lookups")  # Clear everything cache_clear("all")

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: can also adjust time--live settings disable caching entirely. TTL values seconds. NULL means entries persist entire session.
code: # 2-hour search cache, 1-week detail cache cache_config(   search_ttl = 7200,   detail_ttl = 604800 )  # Disable caching entirely (every call hits the server) cache_config(enable = FALSE)  # Re-enable with defaults cache_config(enable = TRUE, search_ttl = 3600, detail_ttl = NULL)

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: Search results returned tibbles, work directly dplyr tidyverse tools. See Analysis Examples vignette complete analysis workflows visualizations.
code: climate_change <- search_basic("climate change")  # Count by year climate_change |>   dplyr::count(year)  # Filter recent PhDs climate_change |>   dplyr::filter(thesis_type_tr == "Doktora", year >= 2020) |>   dplyr::select(author, year, title_original, university)  # Most common subjects climate_change |>   dplyr::count(subject_tr, sort = TRUE) |>   dplyr::slice_head(n = 10)

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: official API. tezr scrapes <tez.yok.gov.tr> simulating browser requests parsing HTML/JavaScript responses. change portal’s page structure, form parameters, JavaScript patterns break package updated. primary fragility risk. Single-year overflow. Auto-pagination splits year ranges work around 2000-result server cap, split single calendar year. query matches 2000 theses one year, package retrieves first 2000 year issues warning. narrow search supported filters thesis type, language, access type, status, subject, year range. -memory cache . cached data (searches, details, lookups) stored R environment objects lost session ends. can save results disk readr::write_rds() saveRDS() persistence across sessions. SSL verification disabled. YÖK server certificate issues, SSL peer verification turned (ssl_verifypeer = FALSE). security trade-required package function. Fixed rate limiting. Requests use built-2-second rate limit user-configurable, fetching large datasets still takes time. Vector parameter expansion. search_detailed() expands vector-valued supported parameters separate API calls via cartesian product. Passing many multi-valued parameters can generate large number requests. Lookup tables. list_*() lookup functions expose metadata tables YÖK. IDs can passed detailed searches skip name lookup. Metadata . package retrieves thesis metadata. PDF URLs included detail records full-text files downloaded. can use URLs download PDFs.

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: Cache save results. Run large queries save locally readr::write_rds(), readr::write_csv(), similar functions. reload disk later sessions. Filter paginating. Add year ranges, thesis types, languages, access types, statuses, supported keyword fields keep result sets manageable setting max_search_results = Inf. Minimize server load. Use cached results possible. Avoid repeating identical queries. Validate data quality. Metadata may inconsistencies (missing fields, encoding issues). Clean validate analysis.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Emrah Er. Author, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Er E (2025). tezr: Access Turkiye's National Thesis Center Database. R package version 0.2.0, https://github.com/emraher/tezr.
code: @Manual{,   title = {tezr: Access the Turkiye's National Thesis Center Database},   author = {Emrah Er},   year = {2025},   note = {R package version 0.2.0},   url = {https://github.com/emraher/tezr}, }

title: tezr
text: tezr provides functions query Turkiye’s National Thesis Center (Ulusal Tez Merkezi) extract metadata. Disclaimer: package affiliated , endorsed , connected YOK (Yükseköğretim Kurulu / Council Higher Education) National Thesis Center. independent tool academic research purposes.

title: tezr
code: # install.packages("pak") pak::pak("emraher/tezr")

title: tezr
text: Search results use title_original title_translation. Detail records use abstract_original abstract_translation.
code: library(tezr)

title: tezr
code: household <- search_basic(keyword = "hanehalkı") #> ℹ Initializing session... #> ℹ Searching for: hanehalkı #> ✔ Found 1040 results #> ✔ Returning 1040 results  dplyr::glimpse(household) #> Rows: 1,040 #> Columns: 15 #> $ thesis_no         <chr> "1002204", "999418", "1002109", "1001006", "1001935"… #> $ title_original    <chr> "Coğrafi bilgi sistemleri aracılığıyla ulaşım modlar… #> $ title_translation <chr> "Transportation modes through geographic information… #> $ author            <chr> "EMİNE BERFİN ŞAHİN", "GÜNSENİN ALTINKAYNAK", "CANSU… #> $ university        <chr> "YILDIZ TEKNİK ÜNİVERSİTESİ", "PAMUKKALE ÜNİVERSİTES… #> $ year              <int> 2026, 2026, 2026, 2026, 2026, 2026, 2026, 2026, 2026… #> $ thesis_type_tr    <chr> "Yüksek Lisans", "Doktora", "Yüksek Lisans", "Yüksek… #> $ thesis_type_en    <chr> "Master", "Doctorate", "Master", "Master", "Master",… #> $ language_tr       <chr> "Türkçe", "Türkçe", "İngilizce", "İngilizce", "Türkç… #> $ language_en       <chr> "Turkish", "Turkish", "English", "English", "Turkish… #> $ subject_tr        <chr> "Jeodezi ve Fotogrametri; Ulaşım; Şehircilik ve Bölg… #> $ subject_en        <chr> NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA, … #> $ detail_id         <chr> "sY_pvMMRcFTFZJBPvsSHDw", "SAPTHPMDjlwDmZOmgUMV4g", … #> $ encrypted_no      <chr> "d-_X3r5CRNDVZ_qEp8nuWA", "5iGLCCiXIg_o7q1Za8MQQQ", … #> $ detail_url        <chr> "https://tez.yok.gov.tr/UlusalTezMerkezi/tezDetay.js…

title: tezr
code: climate_change <- search_advanced(   keyword = "iklim değişikliği",   year_start = 2015,   group = "science" ) #> ℹ Performing advanced search... #> ✔ Found 204 results #> ✔ Returning 204 results

title: tezr
code: phd_theses <- search_detailed(   university = "Ankara Üniversitesi",   division = "İktisat Ana Bilim Dalı",   thesis_type = "phd",   year_start = 2020 ) #> ℹ Found University ID: "3" #> ℹ Found Division ID: "51" #> ℹ Performing detailed search... #> ✔ Found 0 results #> ℹ YOK returned no rows with the university filter. Retrying without that filter and matching the returned rows locally... #> ℹ Performing detailed search... #> ✔ Found 1388 results #> ✔ Returning 1388 results #> ✔ Returning 20 locally filtered results

title: tezr
code: details <- detail(phd_theses[1, ]) #> ℹ Fetching thesis details... #> ✔ Retrieved details for thesis  details |>   dplyr::select(     thesis_no,     title_original,     author,     university,     year,     dplyr::starts_with("citation_")   ) |>   dplyr::glimpse(width = 80) #> Rows: 1 #> Columns: 10 #> $ thesis_no        <chr> "955043" #> $ title_original   <chr> "Dijital ekonomide rekabet olgusu: Nedenleri ve sonuç… #> $ author           <chr> "ORÇUN" #> $ university       <chr> "ANKARA ÜNİVERSİTESİ" #> $ year             <chr> "2025" #> $ citation_apa     <chr> "KASAP, O. (2025). <i>Dijital ekonomide rekabet olgus… #> $ citation_ieee    <chr> "O. KASAP, \"Dijital ekonomide rekabet olgusu: Nedenl… #> $ citation_mla     <chr> "KASAP, ORÇUN. <i>Dijital ekonomide rekabet olgusu: N… #> $ citation_chicago <chr> "KASAP, ORÇUN. \"Dijital ekonomide rekabet olgusu: Ne… #> $ citation_harvard <chr> "KASAP, O. (2025) <i>Dijital ekonomide rekabet olgusu…

title: tezr
text: Getting Started Analysis Examples Function Reference

title: Clear the cache — cache_clear
text: Removes cached search results, thesis details, /lookup data memory.

title: Clear the cache — cache_clear
code: cache_clear(what = c("all", "searches", "details", "lookups"))

title: Clear the cache — cache_clear
text: Character. clear: "", "searches", "details", "lookups". Default "".

title: Clear the cache — cache_clear
text: Invisible NULL

title: Clear the cache — cache_clear
code: # Clear everything cache_clear() #> ✔ Search cache cleared #> ✔ Detail cache cleared #> ✔ Lookup cache cleared  # Clear only search results cache_clear("searches") #> ✔ Search cache cleared  # Clear only thesis details cache_clear("details") #> ✔ Detail cache cleared

title: Configure cache behavior — cache_config
text: Controls whether search results thesis details cached memory R session. Caching can significantly speed repeated queries.

title: Configure cache behavior — cache_config
code: cache_config(enable = TRUE, search_ttl = 3600, detail_ttl = NULL)

title: Configure cache behavior — cache_config
text: enable Logical. Enable caching? Default TRUE. search_ttl Numeric. Search result TTL (time--live) seconds. NULL means cache lives entire session. Default 3600 (1 hour). detail_ttl Numeric. Detail page TTL seconds. NULL means cache lives entire session. Default NULL (session).

title: Configure cache behavior — cache_config
text: Invisible NULL

title: Configure cache behavior — cache_config
code: # Disable caching entirely cache_config(enable = FALSE)  # Enable with 30-minute TTL for searches cache_config(enable = TRUE, search_ttl = 1800)  # Cache details forever (until session ends) cache_config(detail_ttl = NULL)

title: Get cache statistics — cache_info
text: Returns information current cache state, including number cached items configuration settings.

title: Get cache statistics — cache_info
code: cache_info()

title: Get cache statistics — cache_info
text: list cache statistics: enabled - Whether caching enabled search_count - Number cached search results range_count - Number cached year-range searches detail_count - Number cached thesis details search_ttl - Search cache TTL seconds (NULL = session) detail_ttl - Detail cache TTL seconds (NULL = session)

title: Get cache statistics — cache_info
code: cache_info() #> $enabled #> [1] TRUE #>  #> $search_count #> [1] 0 #>  #> $range_count #> [1] 0 #>  #> $detail_count #> [1] 0 #>  #> $search_ttl #> [1] 3600 #>  #> $detail_ttl #> NULL #>

what: Get detailed information about a thesis — detail
title: Get detailed information about a thesis — detail
text: Retrieves full details one theses Turkish National Thesis Center using encoded IDs search results.

title: Get detailed information about a thesis — detail
code: detail(detail_id, progress = TRUE, encrypted_no = NULL, ...)

title: Get detailed information about a thesis — detail
text: detail_id Character vector, detail URL, search-result data frame. Character values may encoded IDs detail_id column redesigned YOK detail URLs. data frame returned search function can passed directly. Accepts multiple values rows batch retrieval. progress Logical. Show text progress updates fetching multiple theses? Default TRUE. encrypted_no Character vector. Optional encrypted thesis number encrypted_no column redesigned search results. available, detail() includes YOK detail request uses JSON detail endpoint add citation metadata. ... Reserved internal use.

title: Get detailed information about a thesis — detail
text: tibble thesis details (one row per thesis). Columns (order): thesis_no - Thesis number title_original - Original title title_translation - Title translation available author - Author name advisor - Advisor name title co_advisor - Co-advisor name(s) (semicolon-separated multiple; NA absent) university - University name institute - Institute name division - Division name year - Year pages - Number pages thesis_type_tr - Thesis type Turkish (e.g., "Doktora", "Yüksek Lisans") thesis_type_en - Thesis type English (e.g., "Doctorate", "Master's") language_tr - Language Turkish (e.g., "Türkçe", "İngilizce") language_en - Language English (e.g., "Turkish", "English") subject_tr - Turkish subject classifications (semicolon-separated multiple) subject_en - English subject classifications (semicolon-separated multiple) abstract_original - Abstract thesis's original language available abstract_translation - Translated abstract available keywords_tr - Turkish keywords (includes keywords index field) keywords_en - English keywords (includes keywords index field) access_status - Access status (open/restricted) pdf_url - URL download PDF (available) detail_url - URL thesis detail page citation_apa, citation_ieee, citation_mla, citation_chicago, citation_harvard - Citation strings YOK's JSON detail endpoint available

title: Get detailed information about a thesis — detail
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Search for theses results <- search_basic("panel veri")  # Get details for a single thesis, including citation metadata when present thesis_details <- detail(results[1, ])  # Get details for multiple theses (batch) all_details <- detail(results)  # Without progress updates all_details <- detail(results, progress = FALSE) } # }

what: Advanced search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_advanced
title: Advanced search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_advanced
text: Keyword-based search common filter options. Similar basic search adds year filtering, language, university, institute, group, status filters. Limited 2000 results per request (server limit). results field-specific searches, use search_detailed.

title: Advanced search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_advanced
code: search_advanced(   keyword,   search_field = c("title", "all", "author", "supervisor", "subject", "index",     "abstract"),   match_type = c("exact", "contains"),   year_start = NULL,   year_end = NULL,   group = c("all", "science", "social", "medical"),   university = NULL,   university_id = NULL,   thesis_type = c("all", "masters", "phd", "medical_specialty", "arts", "dentistry",     "medical_sub", "pharmacy"),   institute = NULL,   institute_id = NULL,   language = NULL,   access_type = c("all", "open", "restricted"),   status = c("approved", "all", "in_preparation"),   max_search_results = 2000,   ignore_cache = FALSE )

title: Advanced search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_advanced
text: keyword Character. single search term. search_field Character. field search . One "title", "author", "supervisor", "subject", "index", "abstract", "". Default "title" (matches web advanced search form). match_type Character. Keyword matching strategy. One "exact" (matches keyword entered) "contains" (substring match). Default "exact". year_start Integer. Start year (optional). year_end Integer. End year (optional). group Character. Group filter. One "", "science", "social", "medical". Default "". university Character. University name (optional). provided without university_id, ID looked automatically. university_id Integer. University ID (optional). Use skip lookup. thesis_type Character. Type thesis. One "", "masters", "phd", "medical_specialty", "arts", "dentistry", "medical_sub", "pharmacy". Default "". institute Character. Institute name (optional). provided without institute_id, ID looked automatically. Institute filters require field-specific search_field. institute_id Integer. Institute ID (optional). Use skip lookup. Institute filters require field-specific search_field. language Integer language ID character label (e.g., "tr", "en", "Turkish", "İngilizce"). access_type Character. Access type. One "", "open", "restricted". Default "". status Character. Thesis status. One "", "approved", "in_preparation". Default "approved". max_search_results Maximum results return. Default 2000 (server limit per query). Use higher values Inf paginate retrieve results via year-range splitting. ignore_cache Logical. TRUE, bypass cached search/range results fetch fresh data server.

title: Advanced search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_advanced
text: tibble containing thesis records (structure search_basic).

title: Advanced search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_advanced
text: YOK portal's advanced search form supports three keyword rows combined Boolean operators (, , ), targeting different field. function exposes first keyword row. R packages interface academic databases, rentrez (PubMed) europepmc (Europe PMC), pass Boolean logic single query string (e.g., "term1 term2"). YOK portal accept free-form Boolean strings; uses structured form fields keyword row, making pattern inapplicable . University group filters sent keyword endpoint. Institute filters sent detailed form field-specific searches YOK's -field keyword endpoint ignores institute values. equivalent results: across fields: use search_detailed field-specific parameters (title, author, supervisor, etc.). : run separate searches combine dplyr::bind_rows() |> dplyr::distinct(). : run searches exclude dplyr::anti_join().

title: Advanced search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_advanced
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Keyword search with year filter climate <- search_advanced(   keyword = "iklim değişikliği",   year_start = 2015 )  # Search PhD theses only ml <- search_advanced(   keyword = "makine öğrenmesi",   thesis_type = "phd" )  # Search in-preparation theses ongoing <- search_advanced(   keyword = "ekonometri",   status = "in_preparation" )  # Paginate a broad query all_climate <- search_advanced(   keyword = "iklim değişikliği",   max_search_results = Inf ) } # }

what: Search the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_basic
title: Search the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_basic
text: Searches Turkiye's National Thesis Center (Ulusal Tez Merkezi) database returns matching thesis records.

title: Search the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_basic
code: search_basic(   keyword,   search_field = c("all", "title", "author", "supervisor", "subject", "index",     "abstract", "thesis_no"),   access_type = c("all", "open", "restricted"),   thesis_type = c("all", "masters", "phd", "medical_specialty", "arts", "dentistry",     "medical_sub", "pharmacy"),   max_search_results = 2000,   ignore_cache = FALSE )

title: Search the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_basic
text: keyword Character. search term(s). search_field Character. field search . One "title", "author", "supervisor", "subject", "index", "abstract", "". Default "". legacy "thesis_no" value supported YOK's keyword endpoint. Use search_detailed(thesis_no = ...) instead. access_type Character. Access type filter. One "", "open", "restricted". Default "". thesis_type Character. Type thesis search . One "", "masters", "phd", "medical_specialty", "arts", "dentistry", "medical_sub", "pharmacy". Default "". max_search_results Maximum results return. Default 2000 (server limit per query). Set Inf automatically delegate search_advanced pagination results exceed 2000. ignore_cache Logical. TRUE, bypass cached search/range results fetch fresh data server.

title: Search the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_basic
text: tibble containing thesis records columns: thesis_no - Unique thesis identifier title_original - Original title title_translation - Title translation available author - Author name university - University name year - Year thesis thesis_type_tr - Type thesis Turkish thesis_type_en - Type thesis English language_tr - Thesis language Turkish language_en - Thesis language English subject_tr - Turkish subject classification subject_en - English subject classification detail_id - ID fetching details

title: Search the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_basic
text: Basic search returns 2000 results per query (YOK server limit). results exceed 2000 max_search_results > 2000, search delegates search_advanced paginates via year-range splitting retrieve results. Single-year ranges can still capped server. default max_search_results = 2000, warning issued suggesting max_search_results = Inf.

title: Search the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_basic
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Search for theses (returns up to 2000 results) search_results <- search_basic("hanehalkı")  # Search for PhD theses by a specific author search_results <- search_basic("Nilay Ünsal", search_field = "author", thesis_type = "masters")  # Search for open access theses search_results <- search_basic("tarım", access_type = "open")  # Paginate beyond the first server batch when possible all_results <- search_basic("hanehalkı", max_search_results = Inf) } # }

what: Detailed search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_detailed
title: Detailed search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_detailed
text: Searches YOK's redesigned detailed form. total results exceed 2000, automatically paginates using year ranges retrieve results. broad single-year ranges can still capped server.

title: Detailed search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_detailed
code: search_detailed(   university = NULL,   university_id = NULL,   thesis_type = "all",   year_start = NULL,   year_end = NULL,   institute = NULL,   institute_id = NULL,   access_type = "all",   group = "all",   thesis_no = NULL,   division = NULL,   division_id = NULL,   status = "approved",   title = NULL,   discipline = NULL,   discipline_id = NULL,   language = NULL,   author = NULL,   subject = NULL,   supervisor = NULL,   keyword = NULL,   abstract = NULL,   max_search_results = 2000,   ignore_cache = FALSE )

title: Detailed search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_detailed
text: university University name filter. provided without university_id, ID looked automatically. university_id University ID filter. Use skip lookup. thesis_type Type(s) thesis. Default "". Accepts character vector multiple types: "", "masters", "phd", "medical_specialty", "arts", "dentistry", "medical_sub", "pharmacy". Multiple values trigger separate searches combined. year_start Start year (optional). Used pagination results > 2000. year_end End year (optional). Used pagination results > 2000. institute Institute name filter. provided without institute_id, ID looked automatically. institute_id Institute ID filter. Use skip lookup. access_type Access type. Default "". Accepts character vector multiple access types: "", "open", "restricted". Multiple values trigger separate searches combined. group Group filter. One "", "science", "social", "medical". thesis_no Thesis number search . uses YOK's detailed form endpoint redesigned keyword endpoint unreliable thesis numbers. division Division name filter. provided without division_id, ID looked automatically. division_id Division ID filter. Use skip lookup. status Character. Thesis status filter. One "approved", "", "in_preparation". Default "approved". title Title search (optional). Accepts character vector multiple titles. discipline Discipline name filter. provided without discipline_id, ID looked automatically. discipline_id Discipline ID filter. Use skip lookup. language Integer language ID character label (e.g., "tr", "en", "Turkish", "İngilizce"). Accepts character vector multiple languages. author Author name (optional). Accepts character vector multiple authors. subject Subject (Konu) name (optional). Accepts character vector multiple subjects. supervisor Supervisor name (optional). Accepts character vector multiple supervisors. keyword Keyword text (Dizin) search (optional). Accepts character vector multiple keywords. abstract Abstract text search (optional). Accepts character vector multiple abstracts. max_search_results Maximum results return. Default 2000 (server limit per query). Use higher values Inf paginate beyond first server batch year-range splitting can narrow request server cap. ignore_cache Logical. TRUE, bypass cached search/range results fetch fresh data server.

title: Detailed search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_detailed
text: tibble containing thesis records columns: thesis_no - Unique thesis identifier title_original - Original title title_translation - Title translation available author - Author name university - University name year - Year thesis thesis_type_tr - Type thesis Turkish thesis_type_en - Type thesis English language_tr - Thesis language Turkish language_en - Thesis language English subject_tr - Turkish subject classification subject_en - English subject classification detail_id - ID fetching details

title: Detailed search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_detailed
text: detailed form accepts field-specific institutional filters request, including title, author, supervisor, subject, keyword, abstract, thesis_no, university, institute, division, discipline, group. Vector-valued fields expanded separate requests, results combined deduplicated thesis number.

title: Detailed search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_detailed
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Field-specific search with year filter climate <- search_detailed(   title = "iklim değişikliği",   year_start = 2015,   year_end = 2024 )  # Title search with a thesis type filter ml_theses <- search_detailed(   title = "makine öğrenmesi",   thesis_type = "phd" )  # Search by subject and year range search_results <- search_detailed(   subject = "Ekonometri",   year_start = 2020,   year_end = 2023 )  # Paginate a broad subject search all_econ <- search_detailed(subject = "Ekonometri", max_search_results = Inf)  # Search for a specific supervisor's theses search_results <- search_detailed(supervisor = "Hasan Şahin")  # Search for a specific thesis number search_results <- search_detailed(thesis_no = "12345")  # Search for multiple titles search_results <- search_detailed(   title = c("Ekonometri", "Zaman Serileri") )  # Search for multiple languages search_results <- search_detailed(   subject = "Ekonomi",   language = c("tr", "en") )  # Search for multiple thesis types search_results <- search_detailed(   subject = "Ekonomi",   thesis_type = c("phd", "masters") )  # Search for multiple access types search_results <- search_detailed(   subject = "Makine Mühendisliği",   access_type = c("open", "restricted") )  # Complex multi-parameter search search_results <- search_detailed(   author = c("Ahmet Yılmaz", "Mehmet Demir"),   year_start = 2020 ) } # }

what: tezr: Access the Turkiye's National Thesis Center Database — tezr-package
title: tezr: Access the Turkiye's National Thesis Center Database — tezr-package
text: Access Turkiye's National Thesis Center (Ulusal Tez Merkezi) database https://tez.yok.gov.tr. Search, retrieve, analyze dissertation metadata Turkish universities. Supports basic advanced search, thesis details retrieval, lookup tables, aggregate statistics.

title: tezr: Access the Turkiye's National Thesis Center Database — tezr-package
text: Maintainer: Emrah Er eer@eremrah.com

title: tezr 0.2.0
text: release restores compatibility redesigned YOK thesis search pages.

title: tezr 0.2.0
text: search_basic(), search_advanced(), search_detailed() now work redesigned YOK search results. Large search results parse much faster, including searches return full 2000-result server batch. Switching keyword detailed searches one R session longer returns stale results previous search. University filters search_detailed() reliable year- thesis-type-filtered searches. list_recent_theses() lists theses added last 15 days current publication year.

title: tezr 0.2.0
text: detail() now accepts search-result rows directly. Use detail(results[1, ]) one thesis detail(results) batch retrieval. detail() returns APA, IEEE, MLA, Chicago, Harvard citation fields YOK provides . detail() retries batch requests sequentially live site rejects parallel detail request.

title: tezr 0.1.0
text: Initial release.

title: tezr 0.1.0
text: search_basic() performs keyword search across search fields type access type filters. search_advanced() adds year range, language, group, university/institute, status filters keyword search. search_detailed() provides field-specific institutional filters (university, division, subject, discipline, supervisor). Accepts vector-valued parameters automatic expansion deduplication. Automatic pagination via adaptive year-range splitting results exceed 2000-result server limit. Set max_search_results = Inf paginate beyond first server batch year ranges can split cap.

title: tezr 0.1.0
text: detail() fetches full thesis metadata (bilingual titles, abstracts, keywords, advisor/co-advisor, page count, PDF URL) one theses. Supports batch retrieval parallel requests.

title: tezr 0.1.0
text: list_universities(), list_institutes(), list_divisions(), list_disciplines(), list_subjects() return entity lists database name--ID mappings.

title: tezr 0.1.0
text: stats_years(), stats_universities(), stats_subjects(), stats_types() return aggregate thesis counts directly portal.

title: tezr 0.1.0
text: cache_config() controls -memory caching configurable TTL. cache_info() reports cache state item counts. cache_clear() removes cached searches, details, /lookups.

title: tezr 0.1.0
text: Session management automatic cookie handling refresh. Rate limiting (2-second delay requests). SSL verification disabled default due server certificate issues.
